title: Staining with P-RANbodies
author: Masahito Yamagata
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.pqadmse
materials: After the blocking solution was removed, incubated with P-RANbody diluted in DMEM10 (DulbeccoMEM plus 10% fetal calf serum, pH7.4) overnight at 4 °C. Do not include sodium azide in this reaction because azide inactivates HRP. If a preservative is required, use ProClin 150 (Millipore-Sigma). How to use ProClin 150. http://dshb.biology.uiowa.edu/Antibody-Collections/FAQ#proclin150 https://www.sigmaaldrich.com/catalog/substance/proclin1501234598765?lang=en&region=US To generate and optimize P-RANbodies, please look at 'Generation and preparation of RANbodies' (in preparation).

steps.title: Fix cultured cells with with 4%...
steps.instruction: Fix cultured cells with with 4% (wt/vol) paraformaldehyde/PBS at 4 °C for 15 min. The method is essentially same as common immunocytochemical staining. This fixation should be optimized if necessary.

steps.title: Treat cells with 0
steps.instruction: Treat cells with 0.1% (w/v) Triton X-100/PBS supplemented with 0.3% (w/v) H 2 O 2 at 4 °C for 15 min, Some cells or tissues might show endogenous peroxidase activity. In this case, incubate cells with 0.3% H 2 O 2 for a long time (eg, a couple of hours to overnight). In some cases, it is also possible to perform this step with 0.3%H 2 O 2 in methanol at -20C for overnight. However, it depends on the RANbody-antigen reaction.

steps.title: Rinsed with PBS (eg
steps.instruction: Rinsed with PBS (eg. 3 min x 3 times).

steps.title: Block with 5% (w/v) skim milk...
steps.instruction: Block with 5% (w/v) skim milk in PBS at room temperature for 30 min. (It is also possible to use BSA etc for blocking). Sodium azide (NaN 3 , 0.02%w/v) can be included in this skim milke blocker, but it is important to rinse cells extensively at Step 5.

steps.title: Stain with tyramide dye (TSA Plus kit from Perkin-Elmer)
steps.instruction: Stain with tyramide dye (TSA Plus kit from Perkin-Elmer). Typically, incubate for 5 min to 30 min. However, it is possible to extend incubation up to 3-4 hours. Do not dry out. For beginners, these evaluation kits from PerkinElmer are affordable. TSA Plus Cyanine 3 Evaluation Kit TSA Plus Fluorescein Evaluation Kit http://www.perkinelmer.com/category/tissue-biomarker-reagents/tsa-plus/

steps.title: Rinse stained cells with PBS overnight...
steps.instruction: Rinse stained cells with PBS overnight (just incubate without changing PBS). For the best result, it is important to remove background extensively. If the signal is intense, it might not be required to rinse for a long time. If the second immunostaining is necessary, start immunostaining from this step. In this case, this long rinsing step can be omitted.

steps.title: Mount in Fluoro-Gel (Electron Microscopy Sciences),...
steps.instruction: Mount in Fluoro-Gel (Electron Microscopy Sciences), or the similar mounting reagent. For questions or discussion, please post them on the RANbody forum . https://www.protocols.io/groups/ranbody
